steps.title: Identify the slopes from each equation
steps.content:
The line $y = x + 13$ has slope \$1$.
The line $y = 4x$ has slope \$4$.

steps.title: Apply the slope test for intersection
steps.content: When two lines have different slopes, they cannot be parallel and must intersect at exactly one point. Since the slopes are \$1$ and \$4$, the lines intersect at exactly one point. That matches choice B — B is correct.
